design_philosophy: Scandinavian minimalism meeting trustworthy corporate design. Heavy focus on negative space, breathable layouts, and functional 'Lugn blå' (calm blue) accents to inspire trust and cleanliness. Combines the 'Tetris' bento grid for services to avoid generic SaaS repetition, using a mix of high-quality photography and crisp icons.

typography.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tight text-slate-900
typography.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-normal tracking-tight text-slate-900

sections.name: Header
sections.style: Fixed to top, z-50, glass_header. Logo on left (EasyDust in Outfit font, bold). Navigation links centered. 'Få offert' button on right.

sections.name: Hero
sections.style: A massive, asymmetrical layout. Left side: Text content (H1: 'Skinande rent, utan krångel.', Subtitle, Trust badges). Right side: Large featured image spanning full height of hero section with rounded-l-3xl edge. Overlapping the bottom center/left is the Lead Form enclosed in a crisp white card with soft shadow.

sections.name: Value Proposition
sections.style: Horizontal band with subtle blue background (bg-blue-50/50) highlighting trust: 'Kollektivavtal', 'Ansvarsförsäkring', 'Nöjd-kund-garanti'. Huge spacing between items.

sections.name: Services (Bento Grid)
sections.style: Mode A 'Tetris' grid. Mix of sizes. Hemstäd (Large, photo background), Företagsstäd (Large, solid white with blue icon), Flyttstäd (Medium, photo), Storstäd (Medium, icon), Trapphusstäd (Small, icon), Byggstäd (Small, icon), Fönsterputs (Medium, photo), Visningsstädning (Small, icon). Each card has h3 and short description.

sections.name: CTA Section
sections.style: Deep calm blue background (bg-slate-900) with text in white. 'Redo för ett renare hem?'. Button scrolls up to the hero form.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.style: Horizontal scrolling or 3-column grid. Clean white cards, soft borders. Smiling customer portraits. 5-star icons.

sections.name: FAQ
sections.style: Minimalist accordion. No borders on sides, just a clean bottom line for each item. Generous padding.

sections.name: Footer
sections.style: Massive typography for Contact Info. 'Säg hej.' at text-5xl. Phone: 070-712 22 38 (clickable), Email: ivicaikica81@gmail.com (mailto). Very clean, minimal links.

components.button: Rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-all duration-300. Primary: bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700 hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/25. Secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:border-slate-300.
components.input: Rounded-xl border-slate-200 bg-slate-50/50 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20 focus:border-blue-500 transition-all h-12
components.form_behavior: Since no backend is required, use standard HTML form with action='mailto:ivicaikica81@gmail.com' and method='post' encType='text/plain', OR use a JavaScript fallback that opens window.location.href = 'mailto:...'

images.description: Main hero background, clean scandinavian living room
Clean kitchen for Hemstäd service card
Clean modern office for Företagsstäd service card
Moving boxes for Flyttstäd service card
Clean window for Fönsterputs service card

testing.attributes: All buttons, inputs, accordion triggers, and form submits MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-form-submit').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Shadcn components: button, input, textarea, label, accordion.
2. Add 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' fonts via Google Fonts in index.html.
3. Build the Hero section with the form embedded on the page, not in a modal. Form should use JS to construct a mailto link with the form data when submitted, opening the user's email client.

4. For the Services Grid, implement a responsive Bento layout using CSS Grid where some cards span 2 columns/rows. Mix the provided photos (using object-cover) and lucide icons (Sparkles, Building2, Box, etc).
5. Use generous spacing (py-24 or py-32) between major sections.
